comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Feature: Parallel load preserves correctness
  Scenario: Cold load reads all records
    Given a data directory with JSON records for users, posts, and comments
    When I load the database from the schema
    Then the record counts match the fixture sizes
    And primary key lookups return the expected records

Notes:
- This story exists to ensure correctness is unchanged when load is parallelized.
- Performance outcomes will be evaluated via the 10k `full_database_cold_load` yardstick and recorded separately.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Parallel load was prototyped and benchmarked; no meaningful speedup, so the change was reverted. Story closed without implementation.
